## Reviewer Brief

<!-- 3-5 sentences. A reviewer should understand the PR before opening the diff. -->

<!-- What problem does this solve? What should be true after this lands? -->

## How It Works

<!-- Explain the design, not the file-by-file mechanics. Where does the complexity live? -->

- Alternatives considered:
- Trade-offs:
